rulings.Case Title: KATHRYN ZUSCHIN VS. NEW CALIFORNIA LAND COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 30, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs NEW CALIFORNIA LAND COMPANY and DARIN BROWN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant - extension denied. 1) Waived causes of action re UD habitability in settlement relating to these premises in UD action 12-5-2007, CUD-07-621827. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY ANN MORRIS VS. GARY ROSSI et al

rulings.Case Title: PETE TRACHY VS. TROY KING et al

rulings.Case Title: 177 POST STREET ACCOCIATES VS. METROPOLITAN COFFEE & CONCESSION COMPANY, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 30, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT METROPOLITAN COFFEE & CONCESSION COMPANY, LLC's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer, not uncertain. Defense counsel to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C in the future. Plaintiff's counsel should be aware 128.5 not applicable since December 31, 1994. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: M.A. KARAH VS. ADEL AWADALLA, DBA SUPREMO PIZZA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 30, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANTs ADEL AWADALLA, DBA SUPREMO PIZZA, SAMAA AWADALLA, DBA SUPREMO PIZZA's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Deny, Samaa Awadalla, no evidence; Deny Adel Awadalla, failed to shift burden. No explanation re personal knowledge lack of mailing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LISA E BAYER VS. COLIN BOHANAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 30, 2012, line 9. PLAINTIFF LISA BAYER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, Motion for Summary Judgment, triable issue of material fact re terms of tenancy and nuisance. See declaration of Bayer and Bohanan. Nota bene, moving party's courtesy copy missing pages 4 and 5. = (501/REQ)
